productDisplayName: Clarks Men Brown Quay Point Mahogany Leather Shoes
description: Style Note Enjoy the luxury of royal footwear in this smart Quay Point slip-on leather shoe from clarks. The flexible non-slip composition sole enhances foot luxury without compromising on durability, while the soft leather apron front makes it perfect for both formal and casual occasions. Product Details Leather upper in a slip-on style with stitched detailing Leather padded inner and tongue Flexible rubber outsole with herringbone grooves and upraised heel Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Brush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
